props.title: What Our Commercial Clients Say
props.description: Hear from business owners who trust us with their commercial electrical needs.

testimonials.name: David M.
testimonials.content: They handled our restaurant's electrical installation professionally and on schedule. The team worked efficiently and ensured all kitchen equipment was properly wired. Excellent communication throughout the project and competitive pricing.

testimonials.name: Sarah K.
testimonials.content: Our office building needed a complete electrical upgrade. They completed the work with minimal disruption to our business operations. Professional team, quality workmanship, and great customer service from start to finish.

props.title: Ready to Start Your Commercial Electrical Project?
props.description: Contact us today for a free consultation and detailed project estimate. Our commercial electricians are ready to help with projects of any size.
props.contactInfo: We will get back to you within 24 hours, or you can call us everyday at 09.00 AM - 11.00 PM

props.title: Commercial Electrical Services FAQ
props.description: Common questions about our commercial electrical services and project process.

faqs.question: What types of commercial properties do you service?
faqs.answer: We service all types of commercial properties including offices, retail stores, restaurants, warehouses, medical facilities, hotels, and industrial buildings.

faqs.question: Do you work on weekends or after hours?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer flexible scheduling including evenings and weekends to minimize disruption to your business operations.

faqs.question: Are you licensed for commercial electrical work?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our electricians are fully licensed and insured for commercial electrical work with extensive experience in commercial projects.

faqs.question: Do you provide free estimates?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide free, detailed estimates for all commercial electrical projects with no obligation.

faqs.question: How long does a typical commercial project take?
faqs.answer: Project timelines vary based on scope and complexity. We provide detailed schedules during the estimate phase and work efficiently to meet deadlines.

faqs.question: Do you offer maintenance contracts?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer preventive maintenance programs to keep your commercial electrical systems running safely and efficiently.
